{{CargoRelic
|name=Assassin's Token
|class_id=20450
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=The signature token of the most powerful assassin organization in the world with the logo engraved on it. Possessed only by a handful of elite assassins, it not only symbolizes the holder's status, but also represents its power and might. However, it can bring trouble sometimes.
|fame=28
|art=13
|fth=18
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +2<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30
|ss2=Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +4<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30
|ss3=Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +6<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30
|ss4=Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +6<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30
|ss7=Per Agent defeated, Snail ATK +6<br>Agents Defeated: 30/30<br> (Awakened)
}}
